sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lam tawntungah kei hong tonpih hi
Tawntung Pasian kei sung nungta hi
A vangliatna tawh kei hong tuam hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nungta hi Zeisu, keisung nungta hi
Kumpi tokhom tung a vangliatna tawh kidim

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak zo
Zeisu liamma hangin ka dam zo
Deih teng cing khin Zeisun hong dim zo.
